title: Skill 12 — Input Validation Schema
description: Required fields from skills 09, 10, 11 before skill 12 executes

fields.description: Funnel stage of the primary persona — drives CTA tone and scarcity intensity
Top desires extracted from verbatims — anchors dream_outcome in value_equation
Validated pain points — anchors PAS sequence and big_domino_claim
Top purchase objections — fuels guarantee copy and risk reversal CTA
Raw verbatims — MANDATORY source for all CTA copy (VoC rule)
The single belief to collapse — drives big_domino_claim in grand_slam_offer
9 LP blocks in order — CTA matrix maps one CTA per relevant block
Brand colors — informs CTA button color context
Hero block headline + subheadline — hero CTA must extend this message, not contradict it
Funnel architecture — impacts CTA placement and scarcity mechanism selection
Core offer price — calibrates value stack ratio (minimum 10:1)
Order bump price — must be in $12-$19 range for minimal friction
OTO price — positioned on Thank You page for buying spree momentum
Phased depletion schedule — drives scarcity_timeline section
Minimum ratio target — skill 12 must meet or exceed this

optional_from_00.description: Competitive intel — used to differentiate offer vs market. Non-blocking if missing.

fields.description: Competitor value stacks — used to avoid saturated promises
Hooks that already work — informs VoC word choices

blocking_error_messages.missing_file: [BLOCKING ERROR: {file} missing — sequential dependency violation. Run Skill {n} before Skill 12.]
blocking_error_messages.missing_field: [BLOCKING ERROR: {field} not found in {file} — cannot generate evidence-anchored offer without this data.]
blocking_error_messages.invalid_price: [BLOCKING ERROR: price_point {value} out of range $17-$47 — skill 12 is calibrated for this price band only.]
blocking_error_messages.ratio_too_low: [BLOCKING ERROR: value_stack_ratio_target {value} < 10 — minimum 10:1 ratio required by doctrine.]
